sutlanding.title: Registration Form
sutlanding.description: Registration Center for Clinical Consultation, Suranaree University of Technology Hospital
sutlanding.no_form_in_clinic: No assessment forms in this clinic
sutlanding.step1_desc: Find the form that matches your symptoms from the menu above
sutlanding.step2_desc: Answer truthfully. Your information will be kept confidential.
sutlanding.step3_desc: The system will analyze your data and show the results with preliminary advice
sutlanding.step4_desc: Our team will review your information and contact you as soon as possible
sutlanding.footer_desc: Registration Center for Clinical Consultation, Suranaree University of Technology Hospital
